=Module type <<a_api_type subproject="server" | module type Icons.S >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module type>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="server" text=".." | module type Icons.S >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>~Output of <<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.Make >>~: a primitive <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|icon>> builder plus a handful of
    predefined icons for common ~U~I actions~.

----
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEelt"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|'a>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|elt>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEattrib"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|'a>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|attrib>>>><<pre id="VALicon" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|icon>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  string list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|icon classes ~(~)>> is an empty <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<i~>>> element whose ~C~S~S classes
      are <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-icon">> followed by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|classes>>~. ~The optional <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~?a>>
      argument lets the caller add extra attributes ~(typically more
      classes~)~. ~It comes last so that the predefined icons below can
      be partially applied and still expose <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~?a>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALuser" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|user>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Predefined icon for a user ~/ profile glyph
      ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-user>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALplus" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|plus>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Predefined "plus" ~/ add icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-plus>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALspinner" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|spinner>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Animated spinner icon
      ~(~C~S~S classes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-spinner ot~-icon~-animation~-spinning>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALshutdown" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|shutdown>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Shutdown ~/ power icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-power>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALconfig" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|config>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Configuration ~/ gear icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-gear>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALsignout" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|signout>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Sign out ~/ logout icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-sign~-out>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALclose" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|close>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Close icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-close>>~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALquestion" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|question>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i_attrib>> <<a_api subproject="server" text="attrib" | type Icons.S.attrib >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|i>> ] <<a_api subproject="server" text="elt" | type Icons.S.elt >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Question mark ~/ help icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-question>>~)~.
>>
